summary: ANDROID 🟥 FMD | When onboarding and 'Dont allow' for location selected then in FMD in main settings dialog keep showing
scenario: Repeated FMD location permission dialog when onboarding with location access set to 'Don't allow'
description_clean: When onboarding with 'Don't allow' for location access selected, the FMD (Find My Device) location permission dialog keeps popping up repeatedly in the main settings screen. After enabling location in Android settings and returning to FMD, the alert play button works correctly. The bug appears to occur only once initially and then does not reappear.
steps: 1. Open the app and begin the onboarding process.
2. When prompted for location access, select 'Don't allow'.
3. Observe the main settings screen of FMD (Find My Device).
4. Note that the FMD location permission dialog keeps popping up repeatedly.
5. Go to Android settings and enable location access.
expected: After enabling location in Android settings and returning to FMD, the alert play button works correctly. The location permission dialog should not reappear after the initial occurrence.
actual: When onboarding with 'Don't allow' for location access selected, the FMD location permission dialog keeps popping up repeatedly in the main settings screen. The bug appears to occur only once initially and then does not reappear.
